skills.name: Agent Skills Discovery Index
skills.description: Publish a skills discovery index at /.well-known/agent-skills/index.json.

skills.name: Content Signals
skills.description: Declare AI content-usage preferences (ai-train, search, ai-input) in robots.txt.

skills.name: Link Headers (RFC 8288)
skills.description: Add Link response headers advertising agent-discovery resources (service-doc, describedby, auth-md).

skills.name: Markdown for Agents
skills.description: Return a Markdown version of HTML responses when agents send Accept: text/markdown.

skills.name: WebMCP
skills.description: Expose site tools to browser AI agents via document.modelContext.registerTool().
